title: Calories Burned Walking 60 Minutes (Hourly Walking Burn by Weight)
introduction: A 60-minute walk is one of the most reliable ways to increase daily calorie burn. Here are realistic hourly burn ranges by body weight, pace, and incline.

sections.heading: 🚶 Quick Answer: 60-Minute Walking Calories
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Easy Pace (2.5 mph) | Moderate Pace (3.0 mph) | Brisk Pace (3.5-4.0 mph) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 140-180 kcal | 180-220 kcal | 220-280 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 170-220 kcal | 220-270 kcal | 270-340 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 200-260 kcal | 260-320 kcal | 320-400 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 240-300 kcal | 300-370 kcal | 370-460 kcal |

Get your exact estimate with the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator).

sections.heading: How Incline Changes Hourly Burn
sections.content:
| Incline | Approx Burn Increase |
| --- | --- |
| 1-2% | +5-12% |
| 3-5% | +15-30% |
| 6-8% | +30-45% |

Incline walking can make a one-hour session much more effective without high-impact running.

sections.heading: How Many Calories per Week From 60-Minute Walks?
sections.content:
| Sessions/Week | 150 lb Moderate Pace | 180 lb Moderate Pace |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 3 sessions | ~660-810 kcal | ~780-960 kcal |
| 5 sessions | ~1,100-1,350 kcal | ~1,300-1,600 kcal |
| 7 sessions | ~1,540-1,890 kcal | ~1,820-2,240 kcal |

This weekly consistency can meaningfully support a calorie deficit.

sections.heading: Make 60-Minute Walks Sustainable
sections.content:
Use this framework:

• Split into 2 x 30 minutes if needed
• Keep 1-2 easier days for recovery
• Use a realistic pace you can repeat
• Track intake in Eati so exercise burn is not offset by accidental overeating

Combine this with the calculator to personalize your plan.

midArticleCta: Calculate your 60-minute walking burn, then use Eati to track meals and keep your weekly deficit consistent.
conclusion: Walking 60 minutes can burn a substantial number of calories, especially with brisk pace or incline. Use the calculator for accurate estimates and pair that with daily tracking in Eati for better fat-loss execution.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Walking 60 Minutes: Hourly Burn Chart
metaDescription: See how many calories you burn walking 60 minutes with practical tables by weight, pace, and incline to support fat-loss planning.

faqs.question: Is one 60-minute walk better than two 30-minute walks?
faqs.answer: Total energy burn is usually similar if intensity is similar. Choose the structure that helps you stay consistent.

faqs.question: Can I do 60 minutes of walking daily?
faqs.answer: Many people can, especially at moderate intensity. Increase duration gradually and prioritize recovery if soreness builds.
